name: Tool Access Delegation
description: Verifiable tool / MCP-access delegation — a grantor agent mints a narrowly-attenuated, rate-limited, time-bounded, revocable mandate cell whose rate / expiry / scope caveats are checked by the verified executor on every tool invocation.

deos.mount: register_deos (src/lib.rs) — folds the composed DeosApp into the StarbridgeAppContext affordance registry; DeosApp::mount yields the axum router
deos.publish: Either (the WORKER tier — the narrowest role that holds the mandate and the narrowest cap-only affordance tier; the mandate cell is a dregg:// sturdyref a delegated agent on another federation reacquires at its own tier)

affordances.view_grant: cap-only, Either (a WORKER reads the mandate's terms)
affordances.grant: cap-only, None/root, carries the REAL Effect::GrantCapability (the GRANTOR hands the mandate's invoke cap forward NARROWED — the cap-graph half of attenuated delegation)
affordances.invoke: GATED (cap∧state), Either — budget-remaining precondition (calls < rate); the fire submits the FULL counter-advancing turn (reading the live calls_made), the executor re-enforcing the installed Cases program (FieldLteField(calls<=rate) + Monotonic(calls) + FieldGteHeight(deadline))

deos.seam: CLOSED — the fire runs against the seeded mandate cell carrying the FULL Cases program (WriteOnce rate/tool/deadline + FieldLteField(calls<=rate) + the invoke_tool-scoped Monotonic(calls) + FieldGteHeight(deadline)), so an OVER-BUDGET invocation (calls past rate), a COUNTER REWIND (Monotonic), and a PAST-DEADLINE invocation (height-aware, unreadable by the deos precondition) all BITE in the deos fire / executor-submission path (tests/deos_seam.rs)
